glosses.ja: 移動可能な; 携帯型

sentences.target: Ich bleibe mit dem Fahrrad mobil.

translations.de: Ich bleibe mit dem Fahrrad mobil.
translations.en: I stay mobile with my bike.
translations.vi: Tôi đi lại bằng xe đạp.
translations.nl: Ik verplaats me met de fiets.
translations.nb: Jeg kommer meg rundt med sykkel.
translations.sv: Jag tar mig fram med cykel.
translations.ja: 自転車で移動しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present, indicative); copular-like verb linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative PP.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner of 'Fahrrad' as object of 'mit'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; head of the PP complement to 'mit'.
Predicate adjective (subject complement) selected by 'bleibe'; describes the subject's state.

sentences.target: Er ist wieder mobil nach der Operation.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ɪst ˈviːdɐ moˈbiːl naːx deːɐ̯ ɔpəʁaˈtsioːn/

translations.de: Er ist wieder mobil nach der Operation.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ɪst ˈviːdɐ moˈbiːl naːx deːɐ̯ ɔpəʁaˈtsioːn/
translations.en: He's mobile again after the operation.
translations.es: Después de la operación, ya puede moverse otra vez.
translations.fr: Après l'opération, il peut à nouveau se déplacer.
translations.it: Dopo l'operazione, può di nuovo muoversi.
translations.ko: 수술 후 다시 움직일 수 있어요.
translations.yue: 做完手術之後佢又可以走動啦。
translations.ru: После операции он снова может двигаться.
translations.pt: Depois da cirurgia, ele voltou a se movimentar.
translations.he: אחרי הניתוח הוא שוב יכול לזוז.
translations.vi: Sau ca phẫu thuật, anh ấy lại có thể đi lại.
translations.ar: بعد العملية أصبح يستطيع الحركة مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: Na de operatie kan hij zich weer bewegen.
translations.uk: Після операції він знову може рухатися.
translations.hu: A műtét után újra tud mozogni.
translations.hi: ऑपरेशन के बाद वह फिर से चल-फिर सकता है।
translations.pl: Po operacji znów może się poruszać.
translations.el: Μετά την επέμβαση μπορεί ξανά να κινηθεί.
translations.nb: Etter operasjonen kan han bevege seg igjen.
translations.id: Setelah operasi, dia bisa bergerak lagi.
translations.sv: Efter operationen kan han röra sig igen.
translations.ro: După operație, el poate din nou să se miște.
translations.cs: Po operaci se zase může pohybovat.
translations.da: Efter operationen kan han bevæge sig igen.
translations.fi: Leikkauksen jälkeen hän voi taas liikkua.
translations.ja: 手術後、彼はまた動けるようになった。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary 'sein' (3rd sg, present); copula linking subject and predicate adjective.
Adverb of repetition; modifies the predicate, indicating a return to a prior state.
Predicate adjective (subject complement) after the copula 'ist'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Operation' after 'nach'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.

translations.en: I work on the go on the train.
translations.hi: मैं ट्रेन में काम करता हूँ।
translations.ja: 電車で仕事をしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present, indicative).
Adverbial use (manner) modifying 'arbeite' (work done in a mobile/remote way).
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition with fused article governing dative; introduces the locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular (by 'im'); head of the PP complement.

sentences.target: Ohne Auto sind wir nicht mobil.

translations.de: Ohne Auto sind wir nicht mobil.
translations.en: Without a car, we can't get around.
translations.fr: Sans voiture, on ne peut pas se déplacer.
translations.it: Senza auto non riusciamo a muoverci.
translations.ko: 차가 없으면 우리는 이동할 수 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有车我们就不方便出行。
translations.yue: 冇車我哋就唔方便出入。
translations.ru: Без машины мы никуда не доберёмся.
translations.pt: Sem carro, não conseguimos nos deslocar.
translations.he: בלי רכב אנחנו לא יכולים להתנייד.
translations.vi: Không có ô tô, chúng tôi không đi lại được.
translations.nl: Zonder auto kunnen we ons niet verplaatsen.
translations.uk: Без машини ми не можемо пересуватися.
translations.hi: गाड़ी के बिना हम कहीं जा नहीं सकते।
translations.pl: Bez samochodu nie możemy się przemieszczać.
translations.el: Χωρίς αυτοκίνητο δεν μπορούμε να μετακινηθούμε.
translations.nb: Uten bil kommer vi oss ikke rundt.
translations.id: Tanpa mobil, kami tidak bisa ke mana-mana.
translations.sv: Utan bil kan vi inte ta oss runt.
translations.ro: Fără mașină nu putem să ne deplasăm.
translations.da: Uden bil kan vi ikke komme rundt.
translations.ja: 車がないと、私たちは移動できません。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; introduces a privative PP.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular as object of 'ohne'.
Finite auxiliary 'sein' (1st pl, present); copula linking subject and predicate adjective.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Predicate adjective (subject complement) after the copula 'sind'.
